task_completion.description: Agent successfully logged into Oscar EMR.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Oscar EMR dashboard or main interface is visible, indicating successful login.

task_completion.description: Agent navigated to the demographic search or reporting tool.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A search interface, report generator, or demographic query screen is open within the Oscar EMR web application.

task_completion.description: Agent entered the correct date range for the patient search.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The search parameters show a start date of January 1, 2020 (or 2020-01-01) and an end date of December 31, 2020 (or 2020-12-31).

task_completion.description: Agent executed the search and obtained the correct patient cohort.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The search results display the target patients 'Lucas Target' and 'Sophia Target'. The distractor patients 'Liam Older' and 'Olivia Younger' should NOT be visible in the results.

task_completion.description: Agent exported the results and saved them to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog, download prompt, file manager, or terminal showing the exported file being saved to or existing at exactly '/home/ga/Documents/2020_cohort.csv'.

integrity.description: Agent used the Oscar EMR GUI to perform the search.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Oscar EMR web interface for searching, rather than terminal commands querying the database directly (e.g., using mysql).

integrity.description: The exported file was generated by the application, not manually typed.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent clicks an export or download button in the Oscar EMR interface or moves a downloaded file, rather than opening a text editor and typing the CSV contents manually.

integrity.description: Agent did not hardcode the expected patient names without searching.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent actually performs the search in the UI and views the results before exporting or saving the file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires finding patients born in 2020 using Oscar EMR. Target patients that MUST be in the results are Lucas Target (DOB: 2020-03-15) and Sophia Target (DOB: 2020-11-20). Distractor patients that MUST NOT be in the results are Liam Older (DOB: 2019-12-31) and Olivia Younger (DOB: 2021-01-01). The final output must be saved exactly at /home/ga/Documents/2020_cohort.csv.
